positive: A highly stylized, maximalist illustration of a whimsical forest creature portrait, centered and symmetrically composed. The subject is a blend of fox and owl, rendered with intricate details, featuring deep sapphire blue and burnt orange tones against a deep emerald green background. The style is modern ornamental, combining Art Nouveau flowing lines with graphic, clean vector silhouettes. The creature is posed majestically, surrounded by stylized botanical elements like glowing mushrooms and stylized celestial constellations. High contrast, clean line work, perfect symmetry, vibrant yet sophisticated color palette. Digital illustration, suitable for fabric print, seamless repeat potential.
